Author: mole99
Content: Often these issues arise because certain cells are optimized away and thus they cannot be found in subsequent steps. Does your design make use of the reset pad?

Author: dorythecat_v2
Content: How do you recommend I make it so that it isn't optimized away?

Author: mole99
Content: You should be able to use the `(* keep *)` attribute on the module instantiation, if you want to explicitly keep it.
